title: Jasmin's Essentials
description: A modpack full of datapacks, mods, and resource packs that my friends and I always use.
body:
To see a full list of mods, click on the version you want to play and scroll down to the **Dependencies** section to see all the mods included in that version.

THIS MODPACK IS ON AN INDEFINITE HIATUS. WILL UPDATE WHEN I CAN.
